mapper.select: SELECT overtime_id, user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM overtime_records WHERE overtime_id = #{overtimeId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT overtime_id, user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM overtime_records WHERE overtime_id = #{overtimeId} AND is_deleted = false FOR UPDATE

SELECT overtime_id, user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM overtime_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY overtime_date DESC

SELECT overtime_id, user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM overtime_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overtime_date >= MAKE_DATE(#{year}, #{month}, 1) AND overtime_date < MAKE_DATE(#{year}, #{month}, 1) + INTERVAL '1 month' AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY overtime_date ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(overtime_hours), 0.0) FROM overtime_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overtime_date >= MAKE_DATE(#{year}, #{month}, 1) AND overtime_date < MAKE_DATE(#{year}, #{month}, 1) + INTERVAL '1 month' AND is_deleted = false

SELECT overtime_id, user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM overtime_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overtime_date = #{overtimeDate} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY overtime_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT overtime_id, user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted FROM overtime_records WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overtime_date = #{overtimeDate} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY overtime_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO overtime_records (user_id, overtime_date, overtime_start, overtime_end, overtime_hours, reason, remarks, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{overtimeDate}, #{overtimeStart}, #{overtimeEnd}, #{overtimeHours}, #{reason}, #{remarks}, NOW(), NOW(), COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, false))
mapper.update: UPDATE overtime_records SET user_id = #{userId}, overtime_date = #{overtimeDate}, overtime_start = #{overtimeStart}, overtime_end = #{overtimeEnd}, overtime_hours = #{overtimeHours}, reason = #{reason}, remarks = #{remarks}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE overtime_id = #{overtimeId}
UPDATE overtime_records SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE overtime_id = #{overtimeId}
